issue: see platform feedback in monitor log

agent_report.changes_summary: Fixed platform oracle flakiness in repair-flask-signalbox-configs by hardening referee startup in tests/test.sh and solution/solve.sh (pkill stale processes, nohup/disown, bounded Python health polling, fail-fast if not ready), replacing solve.sh's unbounded curl health check that could hang for minutes, enabling threaded Flask in environment/referee/app.py, adding reset retries in tests/helpers.py, removing duplicate pytest referee_ready fixture, bumping Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r15, and refreshing submission explanations.
